aronui.when_to_use: Use this tool when you need to remember something for automation planning; it adds a note to the automation calendar's Note section.
aronui.output_shape: Returns a confirmation message indicating the note was added successfully.

pitfalls.text: content is required: missing, empty, or null value results in error: 'error: Error: content is required.'
content must be a string; other types cause the same error.

procedure: Provide the required 'content' parameter as a non-empty string.
Optionally provide a 'title' parameter as a string.
Call the add_automation_note tool with these parameters.
verification: The tool returns a success confirmation if the note was added.
Alternatively, check the automation calendar's Note section to see the note.

predict_records.predicted: error: content must be a string
